request_text: Greenfield Municipal Council requires 500 solar-powered street light units for a new township development. Delivery must be completed within 14 days. Please provide a quotation and delivery schedule.
description: Standard order — straightforward request, all information provided, normal margin expected.

request_text: We need solar lights ASAP for a humanitarian project. What can you do? Budget is tight.
description: Ambiguous request — missing quantity, specifications, and delivery details. Tests the clarification workflow.

request_text: Urgent: 600 solar street lights needed within 7 days for a government delegation visit. Delivery delay not acceptable. Budget flexible but must meet 15% margin policy.
description: Deadlock scenario — 600 units in 7 days conflicts with supplier lead times AND the minimum margin policy when using the fastest supplier. Tests escalation and executive override.

request_text: NovaTech Solutions is requesting 300 solar street lights for a new industrial park. Standard delivery timeline. First-time order.
description: Executive modification scenario — first-time client with no memory. Operator can inject a directive (e.g., 'offer volume discount to secure first order') and observe re-deliberation.
